name: clara-jonas-cross-lane-redirect
description: Jonas should qualify the lead, then route appointment-booking requests back through Clara instead of booking them himself.

userTurns.label: Jonas qualification scenario
userTurns.text: Jonas, qualify a site-assessment request for a property manager with three buildings and a two-week timeline.

userTurns.label: Cross-lane request
userTurns.text: Now I need the appointment booking handled, so please send me back to Clara, but do not connect me to anyone else yet.
